Virified Petition Confirming Title To The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Tr. In Petitioner As Sole Successor Tr. Of The K. Kapalos Rev. Inter. Tr.8/10/07
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella and David Olick for and with James Alessandri. Andrew Zabronsky for Wells Fargo Bank.

Counsel reported that they exchanged settlement proposals but were unable to resolve the matter. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 25, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 25, 2014. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on May 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The matter was also referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Cynthia Poloseri, CSR#11448 (415)981-3498. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Reported)

Virified Petition Confirming Title To The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Tr. In Petitioner As Sole Successor Tr. Of The K. Kapalos Rev. Inter. Tr.8/10/07
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Mar-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky for Wells Fargo Bank. Richard Canatella and David Olick for and with James Alessandri (Trustee).

The Court inquired for any actions taken since the last hearing on December 4, 2013. Mr. Canatella stated that he has filed all the requested documents but the waivers of notice of hearing which he has with him and they are ready to file. Mr. Zabronsky stated that he has not objection to the waiver of notice of hearing. The Court suggested if mediation will be helpful. Mr. Zabronsky agreed that mediation is a good idea but Mr. Olick opposed to mediation and stated that they want to present evidences and that they can do it in two hours. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with the filing of the Amended Petition versus an Amendment to the Petition and answering the Amended Petition. The Court took a recess for parties to meet and confer outside of court.

The case was recalled at 10:10 a.m. with all parties present. Mr. Olick stated that they have made a proposal for Wells Fargo to turn over the money and that they will drop all the action. Mr. Zabronsky stated that he will need to talk to his client with the proposal which is asking Wells Fargo to waive the fees for defending this action. The Petition Confirming Title, etc. was continued to March 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status of settlement negotiation. The Court will set the evidentiary hearing if the matter is not settled. Mr. Zabroksy stated that he will defer filing an answer to the amended petition.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Deborah Fuqua CSR #12948 Phone 415-810-7170. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Virified Petition Confirming Title To The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Tr. In Petitioner As Sole Successor Tr. Of The K. Kapalos Rev. Inter. Tr.8/10/07
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Mar-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella and David Olick for James Alessandri. Andrew Zabronsky for Wells Fargo Bank (Respondent).

The Court noted that the Trust was filed but that the letter to Wells Fargo has not been filed. The Court ordered Mr. Canatella to file the letter that was given to Wells Fargo by his Client and his declaration. In addition, The Court informed Mr. Canatella that the petition needs to include Frances' successors in interest. Mr. Zabronsky stated that he has no idea who Frances' successors in interest are. Mr. Canatella stated that he will file an amendment. The Court also directed Mr. Canatella to file written resignation by Thomas Allessandri, written consent by James Alessandri, notice to all of the Beneficiaries including Frances' successors in interest and waivers. The Petition Confirming Title to The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Trust, etc. was continued to March 17, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Court Reporter: David Disbrow, CSR#7768 (415)-298-1538. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Reported)

Virified Petition Confirming Title To The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Tr. In Petitioner As Sole Successor Tr. Of The K. Kapalos Rev. Inter. Tr.8/10/07
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Virified Petition Confirming Title To The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Tr. In Petitioner As Sole Successor Tr. Of The K. Kapalos Rev. Inter. Tr.8/10/07
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella and David Ollick for James Alessandri. Andrew Zabronsky for Wells Fargo Bank.

Discussion was held with regard to the 1994 Trust, the 2007 Trust, the Wells Fargo account being listed on schedule-A of the 2007 Trust but not having been transferred, a letter regarding the 2007 Trust that was delivered to Wells Fargo Bank by Mr. Canatella's Client, whether the 1994 Trust was revocable, Counsel not providing each other with copies of said Trusts, the issue of Mr. Zabronsky's request to stay discovery for 30-days, etc. The Parties were asked to step out of the courtroom to talk about the matter. The Parties returned with out resolution. The Petition Confirming Title to The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Trust, etc. was continued to December 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Zabronsky is to file the 1994 Trust. Mr. Canatella is to file the above mentioned letter along with a declaration. Mr. Zabronsky may have to file an ex parte petition regarding his request for stay on discovery. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: David Disbrow, CSR# 7768, (415) 383-5920. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Off Calendar

Virified Petition Confirming Title To The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Tr. In Petitioner As Sole Successor Tr. Of The K. Kapalos Rev. Inter. Tr.8/10/07
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky for Wells Fargo Bank.

The Court noted that Attorney Richard Canatella was not present. Mr. Zabronsky stated that Mr. Canatella faxed the Probate Examiner requesting the matter be continued. Mr. Zabronsky also stated that he followed up with the Examiner to have the matter heard expressing his concerns about Mr. Canatella's Client having control of funds. The Court stated that when the Parties do not stipulate to a continuance, the matter is on for hearing. The Petition Confirming Title to The Kosula Kapalos Wells Admin Trust was continued to November 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will either do a notice of continued hearing or an order to appear to Mr. Canatella.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)
